series_metadata.series_description: A permit issued by the Director of Ohio EPA or its designee, including National Pollutant Discharge Elimination System (NPDES) permits, Open Burning Permits, Composting Permits, Scrap Tire Permits, Industrial/Municipal/Residential Solid Waste Landfill Permits, Solid Waste Incinerator Permits, and any supporting materials to implement the requirements of environmental regulations.
